Title: Authorizes fiscal reserve funds for institutions providing instruction to the deaf and blind
Summary: Authorizes fiscal reserve funds for institutions providing instruction to the deaf and blind beginning in the 2026-2027 school year; provides that an annual report shall be provided to the department by any institution that retains such funds.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to authorizing fiscal reserve funds for institutions providing instruction to the deaf and blind
